# Upgrade Plan

## Overview

Upgrade the Java project to the latest LTS versions: **Java 21** and **Spring Boot 3.4**.

This includes migrating to Spring Framework 6.x, updating `javax.*` imports to `jakarta.*`, and ensuring all Spring ecosystem dependencies (Spring Security, Spring Data, etc.) are aligned to compatible versions.

## Tasks

See [tasks.json](./tasks.json) for detailed task breakdown.

| ID | Description | Status |
|----|-------------|--------|
| 001-upgrade-java-spring-boot | Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4 | pending |
